allow: Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM python.exe /T 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM python3.exe /T 2>nul & echo Done")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=list\(d[''''paths''''].keys\(\)\); print\(''''Has /v1:'''', any\(p.startswith\(''''/v1''''\) for p in paths\)\); print\(''''First 3 paths:'''', paths[:3]\)")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -aon 2^>nul ^| findstr :3000 ^| findstr LISTEN''\) do \(echo PID: %a && taskkill /F /PID %a 2^>&1\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 5824 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, CommandLine")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import inspect; from lightrag import LightRAG; sig = inspect.signature\(LightRAG.__init__\); print\([p for p in sig.parameters]\)")
